title: IVX Owner-Controlled Mobile Build & Store Release — Final Evidence Package
blockingAction: EAS authentication token (EXPO_TOKEN) not provided — cannot initialize EAS project, generate signing keys, or build Android/iOS artifacts

step1_eas_init.configFileChanged: app.config.ts (build marker updated to STORE_V2, sourceCommitSha added)
step1_eas_init.ownerAction: Run: cd expo && bun x eas login (requires Expo account credentials) OR provide EXPO_TOKEN environment variable

step2_eas_build_profiles.backendSecretsInMobileEnv: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is in .env for local dev only — NOT embedded in mobile bundle (only EXPO_PUBLIC_* vars are inlined)

step3_android_signing.signingOwner: NOT_CONFIGURED (EAS not initialized — signing key will be generated under owner EAS account after login)
step3_android_signing.ownerAction: After EAS login, run: bun x eas credentials --platform android (EAS will generate owner-controlled keystore)

step4_android_build.ownerAction: After EAS login + init: bun x eas build --profile preview --platform android && bun x eas build --profile production --platform android

step5_device_acceptance_test.tests: 32-point acceptance test prepared — blocked on APK build
step5_device_acceptance_test.ownerAction: After APK build: install on clean Android device, run 32-point checklist

step6_google_play.ownerAction: Create Google Play Console app, generate service account JSON, place at expo/keys/google-service-account.json

step7_ios_config.ownerAction: Provide Apple Developer Team ID, ASC API key (.p8), issuer ID, key ID. Place .p8 at expo/keys/asc-api-key.p8

step8_sha_verification.renderSha: 31f838e366b989d600c426d171063f53e7b29893 (deploy in_progress → deploying from latest GitHub commit)
step8_sha_verification.webSha: dist/ exists (web build available in repo)

step9_rork_independence_scan.historicalDocumentationReferences: 119 references in IVX's own independence tracking UI + defense code (rork-independence screen, isRorkDomain guard, variables metadata) — NOT Rork dependencies

configFilesPrepared.appConfigTs: Updated: buildMarker STORE_V2, sourceCommitSha 382250dc5365, no Rork refs
configFilesPrepared.easJson: Verified: development/preview/production profiles, Android app-bundle, iOS store distribution, submit config for ASC + Google Play
configFilesPrepared.easignore: Created: excludes __tests__/, mocks/, docs/, deploy/, scripts/, backend/, *.test.ts
configFilesPrepared.env: Clean: EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=https://api.ivxholding.com, no Rork vars, no localhost, no exp://
configFilesPrepared.bunLock: 0 rork refs, clean install works without Rork auth

ownerActionsRequired.action: Provide EXPO_TOKEN or run: cd expo && bun x eas login
ownerActionsRequired.whyRequired: EAS CLI requires authentication to create owner-controlled EAS project, generate signing credentials, and build Android/iOS artifacts
ownerActionsRequired.whatHappensAfter: I will run eas init, write projectId to app.config.ts, generate Android signing keystore, build preview APK + production AAB, and proceed to store submission

ownerActionsRequired.action: Create Google Play Console app + service account JSON at expo/keys/google-service-account.json
ownerActionsRequired.whyRequired: EAS Submit needs service account credentials to upload AAB to Internal Testing
ownerActionsRequired.whatHappensAfter: I will run eas submit --platform android to upload the signed AAB to Google Play Internal Testing

ownerActionsRequired.action: Provide Apple Developer Team ID + ASC API key (.p8) at expo/keys/asc-api-key.p8 + EXPO_PUBLIC_ASC_APP_ID, EXPO_PUBLIC_ASC_ISSUER_ID, EXPO_PUBLIC_ASC_KEY_ID, EXPO_PUBLIC_ASC_TEAM_ID
ownerActionsRequired.whyRequired: EAS needs Apple credentials to build and submit iOS app to App Store Connect / TestFlight
ownerActionsRequired.whatHappensAfter: I will run eas build --platform ios and eas submit --platform ios
